Perforated pale-gray flat panel at right with regular circular holes in rows. Scattered black matte irregular chunks. Copper-orange coiled and sheet fragments upper left. Pale rough textured enclosing surfaces above and left, granular light-colored. Gray flat floor plane, low sheen. Diagonal black-yellow striped band lower right. Small red-orange element right wall. Angled metal linear supports mid-right. Light entering from upper rear opening.

data.archive_note: Filing SPC·334. Rows of identical marked cylinders in a sprayed-surface hollow; recurring triangular glyph on every end. No prior traces listed to compare. The meaning of the repeated symbol still escapes me.

Fine pale traceries snake across green surface between blocks. Lower edge: dense row of short gold parallel bars, single notch interrupting the row off-center. Small circular void near right end.
